name: Ronieri's Deep Fried Parsley
recipeInstructions:
1 Wash the parsley, break off the tough stems and make small bunches of parsley heads.
2 While the parsley is still wet, dip it into flour, then eggs, and finally into the bread crumbs. Shake off any excess.
3 Heat the oil to 375 degrees F (190°C).
4 Place the prepared parsley in the hot oil and fry until golden brown, about 50 seconds.
5 Drain well on a paper towel-lined plate and season to taste with Lowry's Seasoned Salt.
